title: Slag n' Embers
description: A Modular Tool & Metallurgy System mod
body:
### Overview  
---
**Slag n’ Embers** is a mod about metallurgy & modular tools!   
Melt down Ores & Materials in Melters  
Alloy new metals for example Rose Gold with the Brick Forge or Crucible  
Build custom Tools from parts using the Modular Tool Blueprint  
& More planned in the future!  

![Small Smeltery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/56bnCCwq/images/018883ea26a071bee0589dbb4301446bb5638b6e.png)
